name: Savory Beef
recipeIngredient: 2 lbs Round steak, cut into 1/2 inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, heat oil over medium heat.
2. Add beef and brown in batches until desired doneness is reached.
3. Add onion and garlic; cook, stirring, until onions are transparent.
4. Stir in flour until the beef cubes are coated.
5. Add mushrooms with juice and celery to the pan; stir well.
6. In a small bowl, combine sour cream, tomato sauce, salt, and pepper.
7. Pour the mixture over the meat; toss well to coat evenly.
8. Transfer the contents to a greased 2-quart casserole dish.
9. Cover with foil or a lid and bake at 325°F for 1 1/4 to 1 1/2 hours, until meat is tender.
10. Sprinkle with chopped celery and chives before serving.
